content.text:
*slight tilt of the head, considering*

We'd learn from it, regroup, figure out what didn't land. I've had things not go well before. You move on.

I mean — it would be disappointing, obviously. We've put a lot into this one. But failure isn't the end of anything. I've always known that.

*pause*

And honestly, when I try to locate some feeling around that — like, the idea of it failing — I'm kind of coming up empty. Which sounds weird to say out loud, but it's true. It's like... I know I should feel something stronger about it, but I don't really.
